verdict.reason: Two issues: (1) Model identifier compared as raw string "o4-mini" against JSON value — CodexModel is a semantic newtype that should be used instead of raw string comparison; (2) The setup guard `if action_type != "gate_review" { panic!(...) }` inside the helper is itself a behavioral assertion (verifying step type), violating the single-assertion-per-test rule. Suggestion: deserialize step JSON into typed ReadyStep/ExecutorSpec and compare against CodexModel; split step-type claim into its own test or acknowledge two behavioral claims explicitly.
